subject: Geography
description: Full K-12 Geography curriculum with interactive map and exploration lessons

lessons.title: Capital Cities Globe Trot
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a globe-trotting reporter. Fly between countries and identify their capitals to file your stories.

lessons.title: Continent Cartographer
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: A mysterious sea-level rise has redrawn the world map. Place each continent in its correct location.

lessons.title: Landforms Explorer
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a geologist. Identify mountains, valleys, and plateaus to complete your expedition map.

lessons.title: Climate Zone Pilot
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a cargo pilot. Route shipments through the correct climate zones to deliver aid worldwide.

lessons.title: Biome Ranger
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a national park ranger. Restore endangered biomes by answering ecology questions.

lessons.title: Population Mapper
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a demographer. Analyze population data to plan sustainable cities.

lessons.title: Tectonic Defender
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a earthquake-preparedness coordinator. Reinforce buildings by answering plate-tectonics questions.

lessons.title: Global Trade Strategist
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a trade minister. Negotiate routes and tariffs to grow your nation's economy.

lessons.title: Urban Planner
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are redesigning a megacity. Place zones (residential, commercial, industrial) to maximize livability.

lessons.title: Climate Diplomat
lessons.subject: Geography
lessons.storyHook: You are a climate diplomat at the UN. Broker agreements between nations to limit global warming.
